RouteExtensionMethodsHandleTResult Method (IMethodRoute, String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult)

One Identity Manager API Server
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static IContentTypeMatchingMethodVerb Handle<TResult>(
	this IMethodRoute route,
	string verb,
	Func<IRequest, CancellationToken, Task<TResult>> taskFactory
)

Parameters

route
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManagerIMethodRoute
Base route
verb
Type: SystemString
Defines the HTTP method (such as GET, POST, ...)
taskFactory
Type: SystemFuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult
Runs the action.

Type Parameters

TResult

Return Value

Type: IContentTypeMatchingMethodVerb

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IMethodRoute. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
